articles.summary: Most teams aren't getting value from AI tools because no one shows them how to use them.

articles.title: MICROSOFT'S PHI-4-REASONING
articles.summary: Microsoft has introduced Phi-4-reasoning variants, pushing small language models further in efficiency and reasoning capabilities.

articles.title: CLAUDE INTEGRATIONS
articles.summary: Claude now connects to third-party apps, Google Workspace, and web search, enabling long-form research and globally accessible web search for paid users.

articles.title: AI2'S OLMO 2
articles.summary: The Allen Institute has released OLMo-2-1B, a small, transparent model backed by full training data and logs, furthering open research in language models.

articles.title: OBSERVABILITY FOR RAG AGENTS
articles.summary: This article provides a walkthrough of building realistic simulation agents using RAG and LLMOps.

articles.title: WHY WOULD AI COMPANIES USE HUMAN-LEVEL AI TO DO ALIGNMENT RESEARCH?
articles.summary: AI companies might not prioritize alignment bootstrapping when they have human-level AI, mirroring their current focus on advancing capabilities with human researchers over safety efforts. This trend could lead to a dangerous disparity where AI capabilities significantly outpace alignment, increasing existential risks. To avert this, AI companies should already be emphasizing safety over capabilities to prove their commitment to responsible development.

articles.title: WHY DEVELOPERS SHOULD CARE ABOUT GENERATIVE AI (EVEN IF THEY AREN'T AI EXPERTS)
articles.summary: Generative AI, like GitHub Copilot and Claude, is set to transform software development by enhancing productivity and automating routine tasks. While AI tools promise efficiency gains, they won't replace human developers, who are crucial for creative vision, quality assurance, and understanding complex requirements. Developers should embrace these tools to augment their skills and keep pace with technological advancements.

articles.title: AGENTIC PROCESS ORCHESTRATION: THE KEY TO AI AGENTS THAT OUTPERFORM HUMAN WORKERS
articles.summary: AI agents can be your next hyperproductive employees — but without correct orchestration, things can go haywire. Camunda's latest whitepaper reveals how to control your business's orchestration logic for AI agents that remain compliant while going above and beyond. Get the whitepaper [11], or book a demo to see how you can operationalize AI with Camunda [12].

articles.title: GOOGLE'S MEDICAL AI READING IMAGES
articles.summary: An overview of how Google's AMIE now analyzes medical images during chat-based diagnosis, improving its ability to suggest accurate treatments like a real doctor would.

articles.title: OPENAI WANTS ITS 'OPEN' AI MODEL TO CALL MODELS IN THE CLOUD FOR HELP
articles.summary: OpenAI plans to launch a freely downloadable open AI system this summer, aiming to outperform competitors like Meta and DeepSeek. This model may feature a "handoff" capability to connect with larger cloud-hosted OpenAI models for complex queries. OpenAI hopes this integration might drive more open source community engagement with its premium services.

articles.title: FEDERATED LORA FINE-TUNING
articles.summary: Fed-SB has introduced a scalable approach for federated fine-tuning of LLMs using LoRA-SB that drastically reduces communication costs.

articles.title: AUSTRALIAN RADIO STATION SECRETLY USED AN AI HOST FOR SIX MONTHS
articles.summary: Australian Radio Network's (ARN) CADA station faced backlash for using an AI-generated host, Thy, without disclosure. The show ran for six months before a writer revealed Thy wasn't real. Critics argue ARN should have been transparent about its AI use.

articles.title: OMNIPARSER V2.0
articles.summary: The next version of the great screenshot parsing tool from Microsoft. It scores well on the Screenshot Pro benchmark.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY'S CEO ON FIGHTING GOOGLE AND THE COMING AI BROWSER WAR
articles.summary: Perplexity's CEO Aravind Srinivas discusses Perplexity AI's plan to launch its own browser, Comet, which aims to serve as a platform for AI agents. Despite challenges with Google, Perplexity secured a pre-installation deal with Motorola's new Razr phones. Srinivas sees browsers as crucial for AI as they offer opportunities for deep integration and interaction with third-party services.

articles.title: AI MODE UPDATES IN GOOGLE SEARCH
articles.summary: Google has expanded AI Mode to more users, enhancing how people interact with search results through generative summaries and inline follow-ups.

articles.title: AI IS GETTING “CREEPY GOOD” AT GEO-GUESSING
articles.summary: AI tools like ChatGPT and Perplexity accurately determine locations from photos and bird songs based on visual and auditory clues, even without metadata.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY AI LAUNCHES WHATSAPP INTEGRATION
articles.summary: Perplexity has launched a WhatsApp integration for its AI assistant.
